# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews Skia m151 with allocation-free hot paths and .NET 11 WASM support. Multiple per-call allocations in color parsing, tag parsing, HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, and SKShaper glyph reads have been eliminated. Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries extend WASM support to .NET 11.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151 and merges three rounds of upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes into the 4.151 line. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## API Surface

- **SKColor gains ReadOnlySpan<char> hex-parsing overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, avoiding the string allocation on hot paths while also optimising the internal hex-digit lookup. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier has been removed from GRContextOptions, so callers no longer need an unsafe block or /unsafe compilation flag to use it. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — The SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) overload previously leaked a native image handle when the subset operation returned a new object; the extra reference is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Allocation-free parsing in SKFourByteTag and hot SKShaper paths** — SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a char[4] on every call, and SKShaper now reads glyph results through zero-copy spans instead of per-call arrays. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## Platform

- **WASM build cleaned up and extended to .NET 11** — A redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define is dropped from the Skia submodule to silence Emscripten macro-redefinition warnings. Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for .NET 11 WASM targets. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp gains an allocation-free AddUtf8(string) implementation via pooled UTF-8 encoding and removes the per-call char[4] allocation in Tag.Parse, alongside the Emscripten 5.0.6 library update for .NET 11 WASM.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Made HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) allocation-free with pooled UTF-8 encoding and added Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM static libraries for .NET 11 ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered the performance sprint — allocation-free SKColor hex parsing, SKFourByteTag parsing, HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, and SKShaper glyph reads — plus the GRContextOptions unsafe removal and additional upstream m151 bug fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine bump and a WebAssembly build cleanup that drops the redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
